### **Critical Observations**

- **"NUEVO" badges** appear only on 3 cards (OMG, Forever, Creatine X-Plosion Edition).  
- **Heart icons (favorites)** are present on all cards.  
- **Add-to-cart buttons** are not visible in any card.  
- **No broken-image icons, alt-text issues, or truncated names**—all text is fully displayed.  

**Summary**: The grid relies entirely on placeholder imagery (solid colors/gradients) with no real product photos. Badges, icons, and pricing vary by card, but all follow a consistent layout.
